overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a high-speed drive along an elevated urban highway underpass during golden hour. The camera navigates through dense futuristic traffic featuring holographic road advertisements, sports cars, and the Little China district sign, with massive glass skyscrapers lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway underpass with holographic road advertisements

events.description: yellow taxi cab passes by in the left lane
green sports car overtakes on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving steadily under the concrete overpass, maintaining speed with moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving ahead in the left lane
green sports car overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure overhead with circular indentations casting long shadows
futuristic high-rise buildings with reflective blue glass facades
metal security fence running along the right side of the highway
concrete lane divider with red and white markings
colorful glowing holographic advertisements projected onto the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: Driving under a massive concrete highway overpass during golden hour, with futuristic glass skyscrapers visible to the right. The road features holographic advertisements projected onto the asphalt. A yellow taxi and green sports car pass by as traffic flows smoothly.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway passing through Little China district

events.description: bright purple sports car with white wheels overtakes aggressively on the right
Little China district sign becomes visible on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: navigating through denser traffic, accelerating slightly to follow the flow of sports cars

notable_agents.action: bright purple sports car with white wheels accelerating past

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'LITTLE CHINA' marking the district boundary

segments.scene_description: Traffic density increases as the drive continues under the overpass. A distinctive purple sports car overtakes on the right. The 'Little China' district sign appears on the left, indicating the neighborhood. The holographic road advertisements shift position as the vehicle moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: congested elevated highway approach with mixed vehicle types

events.description: green military truck appears ahead in the left lane, traffic flow slows
slight braking as traffic ahead congests and vehicles bunch up

agents.ego_description: slowing down behind a military truck, navigating through heavy traffic with frequent lane changes by other vehicles

notable_agents.action: green military truck with canvas cover and spare tire on back moving slowly
teal convertible sports car with red racing stripes changing lanes

segments.scene_description: The final section shows traffic slowing down behind a green military truck. The Little China sign is now behind, and the skyscrapers recede into the distance. Various sports cars including a teal convertible maneuver through the congested lanes under the continuing overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive under a massive concrete highway overpass that transitions from a smooth flow of traffic into a dense urban congestion. It begins with a glide past futuristic glass skyscrapers and holographic road advertisements, passing a yellow taxi and a green sports car under the warm glow of golden hour. As the vehicle pushes forward, the traffic density increases and a purple sports car overtakes on the right, just as the Little China district sign emerges on the left. The scene then shifts as the vehicle passes the district marker and the skyscrapers begin to recede, with the pace slowing significantly behind a green military truck. Finally, the camera maneuvers through a cluster of congested lanes filled with various vehicles, including a teal convertible, while remaining beneath the sprawling overpass structure.
